connectionParameters.label: Base URL
connectionParameters.name: base_url
connectionParameters.desc: Stellar Cyber server base URL (e.g., https://stellarcyber.example.com)

connectionParameters.label: API Token
connectionParameters.name: api_token
connectionParameters.desc: Stellar Cyber API refresh token / API key for authentication

desc: Stellar Cyber Open XDR Case Management integration.

functions.label: Create Case
functions.name: create_case
functions.desc: Create a new case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.label: Assignee
inParameters.name: assignee
inParameters.desc: User to assign the case to

outParameters.label: Case ID
outParameters.name: case_id
outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the created case

outParameters.label: Severity
outParameters.name: severity
outParameters.desc: The severity of the created case

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber

functions.label: Update Case
functions.name: update_case
functions.desc: Update an existing case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.label: Case ID
inParameters.name: case_id
inParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case to update

inParameters.label: Tags to Add
inParameters.name: tags_to_add
inParameters.desc: Tags to add to the case

inParameters.label: Tags to Remove
inParameters.name: tags_to_remove
inParameters.desc: Tags to remove from the case

outParameters.label: Case ID
outParameters.name: case_id
outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the updated case

outParameters.label: Updated Fields
outParameters.name: updated_fields
outParameters.desc: List of fields that were updated

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber

functions.label: Add Case Comment
functions.name: add_case_comment
functions.desc: Add a comment to an existing case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.label: Case ID
inParameters.name: case_id
inParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case to comment on

inParameters.label: Comment
inParameters.name: comment
inParameters.desc: Comment text to add to the case

outParameters.label: Case ID
outParameters.name: case_id
outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Comment ID
outParameters.name: comment_id
outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the created comment

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber

functions.label: Get Case Summary
functions.name: get_case_summary
functions.desc: Retrieve the summary for a specific case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.label: Case ID
inParameters.name: case_id
inParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Case ID
outParameters.name: case_id
outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Summary
outParameters.name: summary
outParameters.desc: Case summary details

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber

functions.label: Get Case Scores
functions.name: get_case_scores
functions.desc: Retrieve the scores for a specific case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.name: case_id
inParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Case ID

outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Score Details
outParameters.name: score_details

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber

functions.label: Get Case Alerts
functions.name: get_case_alerts
functions.desc: Retrieve alerts associated with a specific case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.label: Case ID
inParameters.name: case_id
inParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Case ID
outParameters.name: case_id
outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Alerts
outParameters.name: alerts
outParameters.desc: List of alerts associated with the case

outParameters.label: Total Count
outParameters.name: total_count
outParameters.desc: Total number of alerts

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber

functions.name: get_case_observables
functions.desc: Retrieve observables associated with a specific case in Stellar Cyber

inParameters.name: case_id
inParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

outParameters.label: Case ID

outParameters.desc: The unique identifier of the case

functions.label: List Cases
functions.name: list_cases
functions.desc: Retrieve a list of cases from Stellar Cyber with optional filters

inParameters.label: Tags
inParameters.name: tags
inParameters.desc: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

outParameters.label: Cases
outParameters.name: cases
outParameters.desc: List of cases matching the filters

outParameters.label: Total Count
outParameters.name: total_count
outParameters.desc: Total number of cases returned

outParameters.label: Raw Response
outParameters.name: raw_response
outParameters.desc: Full API response from Stellar Cyber
